mapper.select: SELECT n.id, n.title, n.author, n.description, n.cover_image_url, n.genre_id, g.name AS genre_name, n.created_at, ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 1) AS average_rating, COUNT(r.id) AS review_count FROM novels n LEFT JOIN genres g ON n.genre_id = g.id LEFT JOIN reviews r ON n.id = r.novel_id WHERE n.id = #{id} GROUP BY n.id, n.title, n.author, n.description, n.cover_image_url, n.genre_id, g.name, n.created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO novels (title, author, description, cover_image_url, genre_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{author}, #{description}, #{coverImageUrl}, #{genreId})
mapper.update: UPDATE novels SET title = #{req.title}, author = #{req.author}, description = #{req.description}, cover_image_url = #{req.coverImageUrl}, genre_id = #{req.genreId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM novels WHERE genre_id = #{genreId}
